channel.title: Resources on Mobile A11y
channel.description: Recent content in Resources on Mobile A11y

item.title: Resources
item.description: This is a personally curated list of resources I have used and think others may find helpful too. I’m always looking for new high quality mobile accessibility and inclusion resources to add here. Please share any you find with me via email or Twitter. Code Adopting Voice Control A great, concise, overview on how best to adopt iOS 13’s Voice Control feature from Kristina Fox Apple Accessibility Programming Guide for iOS No longer updated, but the general principles are still valid.
